raw_consumer_statement: My Barclays Bank XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX was stolen. I reported charges made using my stolen card in XX/XX/XXXX as fraud and requested a new card with a new account number. Barclays Bank US ' fraud department credits my account once a month for the fraudulent charges, but every XXXX  days reinstates the charges and attempts to collect payment from me for the charges that I reported as fraud. It is now XX/XX/XXXX and this issue has not been resolved.
